title: Cognitive Workload 8-level arithmetic
description: This dataset comprises multimodal neurophysiological recordings from 18 participants performing an 8-level arithmetic task designed to manipulate cognitive workload. The study integrated 19-channel EEG, 3-lead ECG, and pupillometry data synchronized via Lab Streaming Layer, with task difficulty systematically varied across seven difficulty ranges plus baseline. Raw data were converted from Lab Streaming Layer/XDF format to BIDS-compliant BrainVision format with detailed event annotations and physiological recordings.
methods_description: Data were collected using a combined mobile EEG+ECG system with 19-channel 10-20 montage (250 Hz sampling, Ag/AgCl electrodes, linked-ear reference) and Pupil Labs Pupil Core eye tracking synchronized via Lab Streaming Layer. Participants completed a 60-second baseline followed by 70 arithmetic questions (10 per difficulty level) presented for 6 seconds each, with difficulty defined by Q-value ranges. ECG was recorded with 3-lead configuration, and pupillometry data were captured asynchronously with per-sample timestamps.
